motifs.name: COMPASS
motifs.description: Find your true north. Trust the direction you already know.

motifs.name: MIRROR
motifs.description: See yourself clearly — without distortion, without judgment.

motifs.name: BLOCKS
motifs.description: Set steady boundaries that protect your energy and keep you grounded.

motifs.name: SPIRAL
motifs.description: Growth isn't linear. Each return brings deeper understanding.

motifs.name: RADIANT BURST
motifs.description: Clarity is breaking through. Let yourself see what's emerging.

motifs.name: FEATHER
motifs.description: Release what's been weighing you down. Move forward lighter.

motifs.name: WAVES
motifs.description: Let emotion move. Flow, express, and breathe again.

motifs.name: PYRAMID
motifs.description: Focus your energy. Precision brings calm and control.

motifs.name: WATER DROP
motifs.description: Feel honestly. Emotion isn't weakness — it's information.

motifs.name: BRICK STACK
motifs.description: Build one solid step at a time. Self-trust creates stability.

motifs.name: SPROUT
motifs.description: Something new is forming. Growth has already begun.
